title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NCC Urban - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NCC Urban - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
